panels.title: Upstream servers (requests and failures per second)

targets.expr: 100 * ( sum by (upstream, protocol) (rate(dns_encrypted_proxy_upstream_server_failures_total{job="$job",instance="$instance"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum by (upstream, protocol) (rate(dns_encrypted_proxy_upstream_server_requests_total{job="$job",instance="$instance"}[5m])), 0.0001) )

panels.title: Metrics endpoint responses by class (per second)
